item.title: NFFC: Nottingham Forest @NFFC · 49s Remembering supporter Peter Tatton, who tragically passed away following a medical episode
item.description:
Nottingham Forest @NFFC · 49s Remembering supporter Peter Tatton, who tragically passed away following a medical episode while in Porto supporting the Reds last week.
The thoughts of everybody at Nottingham Forest are with Peter’s family and friends at this extremely difficult time. 1 5 35 281

item.title: ed_aarons: Ed Aarons @ed_aarons · 1min Strand Larsen replaces Mateta for the second half 3 124
item.description: Ed Aarons @ed_aarons · 1min Strand Larsen replaces Mateta for the second half 3 124

item.title: nottmtails: Paul Taylor @nottmtails · 1min Hudson-Odoi comes on for Hutchinson at half time for #NFFC - four changes for Porto as th
item.description: Paul Taylor @nottmtails · 1min Hudson-Odoi comes on for Hutchinson at half time for #NFFC - four changes for Porto as they look to get back in the game in the second half. 1 1 1 244

item.title: NFFC: Nottingham Forest @NFFC · 2min CHO is on for Omari. 3 3 13 781
